creator: xmirya@gmail.com
text:
The patch attached makes the module compile and (seems like) work at
amd64/recent HEAD. The file in archive should replace
files/patch-fuse_module__fuse_vfsops.c of the port. The only change is
declaring mntopts and __mntopts in fuse_mount() as uint64_t (instead
of int) as states the vfs_flagopt() man.
